summary: Frontend testing of new document type chips feature + send button z-index fix. All 7 test cases PASS.

test_results.test_1_login: PASS - Login with contabilidad@roddos.com redirects to /agente-contable
test_results.test_2_chips_visible: PASS - All 4 chips appear after file attach: Auto-detectar, Factura servicio, Compra motos/productos, Pago/Cuota with correct data-testids
test_results.test_3_servicio_chip: PASS - Clicking doc-type-chip-servicio sets background to rgb(124, 58, 237) [#7C3AED purple], Auto chip resets to white
test_results.test_4_producto_chip: PASS - Clicking doc-type-chip-producto sets background to rgb(3, 105, 161) [#0369A1 blue], Servicio chip deactivates to white
test_results.test_5_remove_file: PASS - Clicking remove-file-btn removes all 4 chips and file preview. Reattaching shows auto chip active (gradient green/cyan = docTypeHint reset to auto)
test_results.test_6_badge_in_chat: PASS - After selecting Factura servicio and sending message, user bubble shows 'test-doc.jpg' + 'Factura servicio' badge label
test_results.test_7_send_button: PASS - document.elementFromPoint at send button coords returns BUTTON[data-testid=chat-send-btn] (z-index 10000 fix works). Click clears input (message sent). No overlay blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: All chips feature working correctly - colors, selection state, reset on remove
Send button z-index=10000 fix confirmed working - element correctly intercepted at button coordinates
User message bubble correctly displays file+type badge after send
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and passing: doc type chips (4 chips), chip selection colors, file removal reset, badge in chat, send button z-index fix. Use page.locator('input[type=file]').set_input_files() to attach files in tests.
